description: One-sentence description of what this sprint builds.

workstreams.name: Core Data Model
acceptance_criteria: Schema validates against fixtures in tests/fixtures/
All exported types pass TypeScript strict mode
Unit tests pass with no skips

workstreams.name: API Layer
acceptance_criteria: All endpoints return correct status codes
Integration tests cover happy path and error cases

workstreams.name: CLI Interface
acceptance_criteria: Non-zero exit code on any error

architecture_decisions.decision: Use a single config.ts module for all environment variables.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Centralizes validation and prevents scattered process.env reads across the codebase.

architecture_decisions.decision: API layer imports from models; CLI imports from API only.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Enforces a clean dependency chain and prevents circular imports.
